work_summary: Reverted to original state to start clean; identified 7 critical bugs that need fixing

issues_identified.description: Skill has conflicting configuration: both 'model: haiku' and 'disable-model-invocation: true'
issues_identified.error: Skill remote cannot be used with Skill tool due to disable-model-invocation
issues_identified.fix: Remove model field from SKILL.md entirely

issues_identified.description: Skill command 'remote-cmd $ARGUMENTS' relies on PATH lookup
issues_identified.error: remote-cmd: command not found (when executed by Claude Code)
issues_identified.fix: Use absolute path to remote-cmd.js via getInstalledPath() in skill command
Remove PostCompact from HOOK_EVENT_TYPES and installation code

issues_identified.error: UserPromptSubmit hook not installed, so discord-hook never runs

issues_identified.fix: Accept both: const sessionId = input.session_id || input.sessionId

issues_identified.description: cleanRemoteHooks() doesn't fully clean legacy or malformed entries
issues_identified.error: Stale hooks with old paths survive reinstall → duplicate/incorrect hooks
issues_identified.fix: Implement removeAllRemoteHooks() that removes all known claude-remote hooks from all events including PostCompact

issues_identified.description: import.meta.dirname points to src/ during development
issues_identified.error: Hooks installed with paths like '/home/user/claude-remote/src/hook.js' instead of installed 'dist/'
issues_identified.fix: Add getPackageRoot() walk-up logic; use getInstalledPath() for all hook paths

files_to_modify: src/cli.ts - fix skill, hooks, cleanup, auto-setup, alias default, uninstall
src/discord-hook.ts - accept both session ID fields
proposed_solution: Comprehensive fix: 1) Remove model from skill, use absolute node path to remote-cmd.js; 2) Remove PostCompact, handle /compact in discord-hook; 3) Install UserPromptSubmit; 4) Runtime package root detection for all paths; 5) Comprehensive hook cleanup; 6) First-run auto-setup; 7) Alias default = false; 8) Enhanced uninstall.
next_steps: Build and test: npm run build
Clean reinstall to apply all changes
blockers: Need to implement changes without breaking existing working state
Must test carefully as multiple interdependent issues
